params.prompt: Open version of a world-cup themed gift box, single object, centered. Reference image 1 = the CLOSED box: a cube gift box whose body is covered in a black-and-white soccer-ball hexagon pattern, wrapped with a glossy GOLDEN ribbon and a golden World Cup trophy as the bow on top, semi-painted 2D cartoon style, clean outlines, 3/4 top-down view. KEEP this exact art style, soccer hexagon pattern, golden trophy/ribbon, colors and 3/4 view. Reference image 2 = the OPEN-box COMPOSITION to copy: the lid is lifted completely OFF the box and tilted, resting on the lower-LEFT, the box body stands open and empty with the inner walls visible, soft drop shadow beneath. Render the SAME soccer-pattern box in that open state: its lid (carrying the golden trophy bow) removed and set to the lower-left, the open box body revealing a softly golden-lit empty interior. Solid pure magenta #FF00FF background (for chroma keying). No text, no UI, no grid, ONE single object only.
